$comment: c38 D-CSUBSET-NESTED-TAG-SCOPE: a tag (SegInfo) defined nested inside struct WalSeg is referenced BY NAME (struct SegInfo *) in a separate function — the sqlite WalSegment/sColMap/IdList_item shape. C 6.2.1p4: a nested tag has ENCLOSING (file) scope. The by-name pointer and the member &w.info must be the SAME nominal type (c24 decl-site identity). RED-ON-DISABLE: pre-c38 SegInfo was trapped in WalSeg's member scope → S_NotAComposite at s->iNext → would not compile. int fields + arrow access only (no p+n). 3 + 4 + 0 = 7. Release pipeline + all 4 targets.
